item.title: Lost Voices

A spoken word piece written and performed by Darius Simpson and Scout Bostley
Oldest extant copy I found was from 9 years ago on Button Poetrycs YouTube channel.
Let this be the start of a conversation not the end of one

item.title: Relaxing on the bottom shelf.
item.description:
Unmute for marbles
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
And also, get REKT. ┌∩┐(ಠ_ಠ)┌∩┐
You can catch deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: ICE gave up after a large group defended high schoolers. Stay informed and stay safe.
item.description: Stay on your toes, mates. They'll more than likely show back up when they think no one is paying attention. Bunch of fucking weirdos and cowards. More on this event here: https://countylocalnews.com/2025/05/30/ices-shocking-move-on-somerville-high-students-sparks-outrage-community-activism-somerville-massachusetts-immigration-news-2025-high-school-student-rights-somerville/ And here: https://thesomervillenewsweekly.blog/2025/05/29/i-c-e-activity-in-somerville/
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Wall Street named him TACO
item.description: It’s a tongue-in-cheek term that stands for "Trump Always Chickens Out” in regard to tariffs. There has been a pattern of stocks plunging when the Trump administration announces stiff new tariffs.

item.title: What Happened Today #119
item.description: ? The incompetence is turning more dangerous. Trump will rally tomorrow to celebrate the exact steel deal he campaigned against, while calling the Federalist Society leader who picked his judges a "sleazebag" because they ruled against him. Now the GOP gets whoever Trump says as judges and there will be no outside review allowed. Meanwhile, his deportation promises have failed so badly they've had three ICE leadership shakeups in five months and created an "Office of Remigration" straight from the European white nationalism playbook. When authoritarians can't deliver, they don't moderate - they escalate. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Subscribe free at the website or on Substack. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-deal-enrichment 2. https://go.govbrief.today/tariffs-appeal-continue 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-meet 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-nippon-steel-rally 5. https://go.govbrief.today/maha-report-ai 6. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-foreign-student-tro 7. https://go.govbrief.today/supreme-court-nepa 8. https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-testing-office 9. https://go.govbrief.today/ingrassia-special-counsel 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-blasts-federalist-society 11. https://go.govbrief.today/aba-judicial-nominees 12. https://go.govbrief.today/susie-wiles-impersonator 13. https://go.govbrief.today/third-ice-shakeup 14. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-ag-contempt 15. https://go.govbrief.today/state-dept-remigration 16. https://go.govbrief.today/asl-interpreters-briefings 17. https://go.govbrief.today/60minutes-mental-anguish 18. https://go.govbrief.today/mine-safety-offices Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/taco-trade-tariffs Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/raskin-probes-crypto-dinner
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Yasss
item.description: I got a psych eval in 2020. I requested an autism eval, as well. I have a strong family history of ASD. It was speculated when I was going into kindergarten I might be autistic. In the 90s it would be Asperger's in my case. But I was too social. 2020 results says: raad score 165! Definitive diagnosis! Right? ... Right? Nope. Because, again, I am too social. My in person presentation doesn't match my raad score typical presentation. "Typically, if someone has a score that high they're profoundly autistic." Be raised by a narcissist and grow up around toxic family and school settings, tell me you don't learn how to mask. I frequently say I deserve an EGOT for my daily performances. Anyway, despite the psychologist saying I don't have it, I've been exploring what unmasking might look like. Today, something really cool happened at work. I got really excited and called attention to it. Another coworker laughed, but it wasn't a kind laugh. It was the "omg, you're so cringe" laugh. Felt the rejection sensitivity of my ADHD hit. Felt the cptsd knee jerk. Felt the ASD shame for existing. Caught that, threw it out, and focused on the cool thing. Continued to express myself in spite of their reaction. And it felt good! I haven't been in a spiral since! I was authentic and cringe and weird and I'm alive and ok, and I got to experience something really cool! Fuck you, haters. The mask is coming off.
item.dc:creator: Wrongclusterbdisorderbutgooff

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.38 CATCH YOUR BREATH
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Fernanda Suarez
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] SunStarr - Tab & Anitek YouTube: https://youtu.be/48VwkRprcB8?si=AWUbSO0RSYTrakZ3 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/4TunhvGtwpMdWG2I1JSAAr?si=b3031be2fd2c48ae
Whimsical Wubbles
Vito Schnabel
Billy Vanilli
Patsy Weingart
Kate Parnell
Igor Wolski
Alex Gray
Dmitri Markin
Anna Podedworna
Akim Kaliberda
乱铁 dirtyiron18
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos
